title: 学院逃生 正式版
description:
This is a semi-open-ended pixel RPG in which the player takes on the role of a student in a school, and the player has to find a way for this student to escape from this school after seven days!

[Rich Ending]

The escape plan must not be leaked, but the trust between the students must not be disregarded, a little carelessness, the whole game is lost.

[Interesting Achievement System]

The game contains numerous achievements, and you will surely revel in the excitement when the achievement trophies pop up!

[NPCs with grateful hearts]

All for one, one for all. What kind of unexpected thanks (gifts) will you bring to the students you've helped once again?

Interesting Interaction System]

Pick up garbage, turn in quests, grow vegetables, fish, dress up ...... All these fun can be experienced in these seven short but long days.

All the people and events in the story take place in virtual space and have nothing to do with the real world.

However, some of the characters and scenes are adapted by the author, Shi Fei Fan, based on my experiences and those of my classmates (My high school. Except for Shen Yi'an's love.).

I'm Shi Feifan, an independent game producer in China, welcome to follow my Bilibili number “正常的一个人”.

You can also add my micro-signal to communicate, or to my e-mail feedback bugs and suggestions, thank you very much.

Micro-signal: blackbird_3

Email：QQ：3362669785
description_short: Use seven days to try to find supplies in the school in order to create an escape kit and get in touch with your classmates to finally escape from this school!
